question: q10
review_basis: manual page-image review: c2_w questions page 6, marks page 6, solutions page 6

mark_scheme_working: five strips from x=1 to x=3 have width h=0.4
trapezium rule gives h/2[first+last+2(sum of rest)]
f(x)=a/(x+1) transforms to 5a/(2x+1) using f(2x) then vertical scale 5
the interval 0.5 to 1.5 maps to x=1 to x=3 under u=2x
horizontal scale halves the area and vertical scale multiplies it by 5

unsupported_reason: graph transformation explanation is manual/contextual

question: q8
review_basis: manual page-image review: c2_y questions page 5, marks page 4, solutions page 5

mark_scheme_working: evaluating the integral from k to 2k gives 1/(2k)+7/(4k^3)=9/4
discriminant is 7^2-4*9*7=-203<0, so it has no real roots
therefore the only real solution is k=1
